github_url.description: Repository URL (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo) used to resolve owner/repo for GitHub APIs.

github_board.description: GitHub Projects (v2) board URL, e.g. https://github.com/orgs/org-name/projects/3 — not the issues list URL.

doc_repo.description: Optional: name of a folder in the Cursor multi-root workspace that contains the documentation repository (sibling of the application repo). Used by /build-from-github for auto-documentation.
